fixes.desc: Added admin role check to /api/kpi GET/POST/PUT via verifyAdmin()
Added PGRST116 error handling + nullish coalescing for latestKpi
Added division-by-zero guard for weeks_to_30k (returns null for zero growth)
Added status enum validation + field whitelisting + UUID check to /api/shipping update_status
Fixed cron schedule UTC→KST alignment: 0 18 * * * for 3AM Korea
Added updated_at column + trigger to content_tracking (schema-v4.sql)
Added updated_at column + trigger to referral_codes (schema-v4.sql)
Added IS DISTINCT FROM guard to auto_update_tier trigger (schema-v4.sql)

regression_scan.detail: Shipping GET handler returned raw error.message → fixed to generic message

confirmed_criticals_deferred.title: Service role key bypasses ALL RLS — architectural overhaul needed
confirmed_criticals_deferred.reason: Requires design decisions on role model, two-client architecture, RLS policy rewrite. Multi-sprint.

confirmed_criticals_deferred.title: No transaction boundaries in multi-step operations
confirmed_criticals_deferred.reason: Requires new PostgreSQL RPC functions for atomic operations. Must fix STRUCT-002 first (done in this iteration).

confirmed_criticals_deferred.title: No idempotency — cron retries/manual triggers can double GMV
confirmed_criticals_deferred.reason: Requires new order_tracking table + cron_sync_state table + code changes.

high_deferred.title: KPI loads all creators into memory
Adapter factory crashes on missing env

recommended_next_steps: WEEK 1: Fix ARCH-004 (idempotency) — highest ROI, prevents GMV corruption. Create order_tracking + cron_sync_state tables.
WEEK 1: Fix ARCH-003 (transactions) — now possible since STRUCT-002 is fixed. Wrap processReferralSignup in RPC.
WEEK 2: Fix UNI-001 (RLS architecture) — create admin/user client separation. Replace USING(true) policies.
WEEK 2: Fix SEC-2 (rate limiting) — add Upstash or similar to /api/join.
WEEK 3: Fix PERF-002 + UNI-002 — batch queries, materialized views for KPI.
ONGOING: Add zod validation to all POST/PATCH endpoints (CFG-002). Add test suite.
